title: AI-generated table styling defaults
sourceLocation: Review of AI-generated admin panels and data-display code from multiple code-generation tools
summary: AI coding agents apply full-cell borders, alternating row colors, and equal-width columns to every table by default, regardless of data volume or column count.
supportingClaims: Small tables (under 10 rows) with zebra striping add unnecessary visual noise.
Equal-width columns in tables with uneven content waste horizontal space.
